ddls:
CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "video_name" TEXT /* Name of the video */,
  "video_source" TEXT /* Source of the video (e.g., camera, drone, autonomous vehicle) */,
  "frame_rate" REAL /* Frame rate of the video */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the video */,
  "compression_format" TEXT /* Compression format of the video */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video in seconds */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format of the video (e.g., MP4, AVI) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the video file in bytes */,
  "capture_date" TEXT /* Date the video was captured */,
  "capture_location" TEXT /* Location where the video was captured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frames" (
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frame */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video the frame belongs to */,
  "frame_number" INTEGER /* Frame number in the video */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the frame in the video */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the frame in pixels */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the frame in pixels */,
  "quality" REAL /* Quality of the frame (e.g., 0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frames_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame the object was detected in */,
  "visibility" INTEGER /* Visibility of the object (0 = invisible, 1 = visible) */,
  "x" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the object in the frame */,
  "y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the object in the frame */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the object in pixels */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the object in pixels */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the object (e.g., person, car, tree) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the object detection (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object being classified */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the object (e.g., person, car, tree) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the classification (0-1) */,
  "classifier" TEXT /* Classifier used for classification (e.g., CNN, SVM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_classifications_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motion_detectors" (
  "detector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motion detector */,
  "detector_name" TEXT /* Name of the motion detector */,
  "detector_type" TEXT /* Type of the motion detector (e.g., optical, acoustic) */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the motion detector (0-1) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold for motion detection (e.g., 0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video the alert was generated from */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., motion detected, object detected) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being accessed */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being affected */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the audit event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action being performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object being tracked */,
  "start_frame" INTEGER /* Starting frame of the track */,
  "end_frame" INTEGER /* Ending frame of the track */,
  "track_length" INTEGER /* Length of the track in frames */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_tracks_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video the segment belongs to */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Starting time of the segment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Ending time of the segment */,
  "segment_length" INTEGER /* Length of the segment in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_segments_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segment_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segment being annotated */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Annotation text */,
  "annotator" TEXT /* Name of the annotator */,
  "annotation_time" TEXT /* Time the annotation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segment_annotations_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES video_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frame_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame being annotated */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Annotation text */,
  "annotator" TEXT /* Name of the annotator */,
  "annotation_time" TEXT /* Time the annotation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_annotations_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., height, width) */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  "feature_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the feature (e.g., pixels, meters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_features_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frame_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., brightness, contrast) */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  "feature_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the feature (e.g., percentage, ratio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_features_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id")
)
